name: Kandio
description:
Welcome to the Kandio API documentation.

Kandio is a curated skill-testing marketplace with assessment tests made by the world’s top 0.1%. Hire proven candidates and avoid empty talk. The API allows you to connect our platform with your system and send data both ways.

Our typical API clients are other platforms such as: job sites, applicant tracking services and large scale HR departments.
